Name: Time until SW-Reviewer Agreed from the start of the SW-Awaiting AE Assignment phase
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time of SW-Reviewer Agreed relative to the total time of the SW-Initial Reviewer Selection activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time since the Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and SW-Reviewer Agreed are performed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time for SW-Reviewer Agreed in the SW (first submission) round versus the RW (revision) round
SW-Reviewer Agreed Cycle Time within the reviewer selection sub-process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time until SW-Reviewer Agreed is performed per manuscript
Minimum time until SW-Reviewer Agreed is performed in a successful review cycle
Metric: The minimum of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time to SW-Reviewer Agreed grouped by the number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers events preceding it
Minimum time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time to SW-Reviewer Agreed grouped by case variant
Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Declined and the subsequent SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time it takes the SW-Reviewer Agreed to be done versus the total time for SW-Reviewer Unavailable
Metric: The sum of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed after the execution of SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time from Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Difference in total time for SW-Reviewer Agreed between variants with and without SW-Reviewer Unavailable events
Stability of SW-Reviewer Agreed time across different process variants describing the scientific review process
Average time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
